title: Gemini CLI Evaluation Benchmark Dataset Schema
description: Schema for complex, multi-file engineering tasks evaluating long-context reasoning.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the engineering task (e.g., 'argocd-issue-1025').

commit_hash_base.description: The specific Git SHA before the fix/feature was applied, ensuring reproducible state.

description.description: The exact issue text simulating the user prompt given to the Gemini CLI.

target_files.description: List of files that the model is expected to modify (optional hint).

gold_patch.description: The definitive human-written patch (diff) that resolves the issue.

test_patch.description: The test harness patch to apply before evaluation (e.g., new unit tests validating the bug or feature).

success_command.description: The build/test command that must pass to mark the CLI's solution as correct.
